acceptance_criteria.description: User submits product query → Query matches product domain → Product specialist generates product report
acceptance_criteria.verification: Product finder specialist implemented in convex/research/specialists/product_finder.ts with executeProductFinder function. Dispatcher updated to detect product domain keywords (buy, purchase, price, laptop, phone, best, comparison) and route to product_finder specialist.

acceptance_criteria.description: Product report completes → Report generated → Report includes structured fields (price, rating, specs)
acceptance_criteria.verification: ProductReport interface includes structured fields: products array (name, price, rating, specs, availability), comparisons array, priceRange object (min, max, average), and topRated field.

acceptance_criteria.description: Service query submitted → Query matches service domain → Service specialist generates service report
acceptance_criteria.verification: Service finder specialist implemented in convex/research/specialists/service_finder.ts with executeServiceFinder function. Dispatcher updated to detect service domain keywords (service, plumber, contractor, cleaner, repair, near me) and route to service_finder specialist.

acceptance_criteria.description: Specialist identifies gaps → Research completes → Improvements logged to improvements system
acceptance_criteria.verification: Both specialists include logImprovementsFromProductResearch and logImprovementsFromServiceResearch functions that analyze findings for improvement keywords and use internal.improvements.internal.submitFromSpecialist mutation. Improvements internal updated to accept product_finder and service_finder sources.

quality_gates.test_details: 22/22 tests passing for US-IMP-011, 1276/1281 total tests passing (5 skipped)
quality_gates.lint_details: No lint errors in new code (pre-existing issues unrelated to this implementation)
quality_gates.typecheck_details: TypeScript compiler has memory issues checking individual files, but syntax validation passed

patterns_followed: All external API calls use rate-limited executeParallelSearchWithRetry
Error handling with try/catch blocks in all improvement logging functions
Follows same pattern as academic and technical specialists from US-IMP-002
Pure functions for confidence score calculation
Named exports for all specialist functions
implementation_summary: Implemented product and service finder specialists that generate domain-specific research reports with structured fields (price, rating, specs) and automatically log improvements to the improvements system. Both specialists follow the established pattern from academic and technical specialists, using rate-limited search with retry logic and LLM-based report generation.
